title: Toggleable Rendering
description: Adds keybinds that toggle between rendering items or mobs, optimizing your game if you want to have long afk sessions in the background. Performance mod.
body:
Have you ever AFK'd at a farm and seen that minecraft takes up quite a bit of ram, cpu and gpu? Well dont worry! 

This mod adds 2 keybinds that can both individually toggle between rendering the items on the ground and mobs. 

They will still be there, you just wont be able to see them, thus lowering the strain on your system, that way, your pc will use less power and you also can have it on in the background while you play something else!


<details>
<summary>Features!</summary>

- A keybind to toggle between rendering all mobs or not.
- A keybind to toggle between rendering all dropped items or not.

</details>
